dieGuteTage.title: Die guten Tage VI
dieGuteTage.location: Literarisches Colloquium Berlin, Am Sandwerder 5, 14109 Berlin
dieGuteTage.description: An evening celebrating Southeast European poetry, jointly organised by TRADUKI and the Literarisches Colloquium Berlin. Manuela Klenke translated and read from "re.volver" by Romanian poet Livia Ștefan — a powerful collection exploring trauma, memory, and personal transformation.

leipzigerBuchmesse.title: Worte bewegen Welten – Leipziger Buchmesse 2025
leipzigerBuchmesse.description: One of Europe's most important spring events for the book and media industry, held in Leipzig from March 27–30, 2025. The fair brought together readers, authors, publishers, and media from around the world. Manuela Klenke and Alexandru Bulucz presented their translations from Romanian: Re.volver by Livia Ştefan (parasitenpresse) and Metallische Igel by Moni Stănilă (Edition Fototapeta).
